LAW AND MOTION 301, JAN-22-2026 RE: DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION. THE MATTER IS NOT ARGUED. THE MATTER IS DISCUSSED. AT THE CONCLUSION OF DISCUSSION, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING AND THE MOTION IS GRANTED. SEE WORD MINUTES FOR COMPLETE RULING. THE PREVAILING PARTY IS REQUIRED TO DELIVER TO DEPT. 301 A PAPER COPY OF THE PROPOSED ORDER WHICH REPEATS VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE TENTATIVE RULING. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. CLERK: ROBERT WOODS. NOT REPORTED. (301/CVA)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-08-2026 Continued To Mar-11-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION
Off Calendar Jan-22-2026 Text Ruling

MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION
Off Calendar Nov-17-2025 Continued To Jan-22-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 301
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
John McGlynn, Pro Per Plaintiff.
ALEXANDER M. MAVROGIANIS, Esq., LEWIS BRISBOIS BISGAARD & SMITH LLP 925.357.3456 Alexander.Mavrogianis@lewisbrisbois.com Attorney for Defendant EXTRA SPACE STORAGE INC

Hearing is held. Discussed, no argued. Plaintiff seeks leave for a continuance in open court to allow plaintiff time to obtain counsel. Counsel for Defendant EXTRA SPACE STORAGE INC. does not oppose plaintiff's request. Court grants leave for a continuance.

DEFENDANT EXTRA SPACE STORAGE INC. MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION. Continued to January 22, 2025 at 9:00 a.m. Dept. 301. Court grants plaintiff leave to file a new opposition pursuant to plaintiff obtaining counsel.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (301/CVA)

Notice Of Motion By Defendant Extra Space Storage Inc. To Compel Arbitration And Stay Judicial Proceedings Pending Arbitration
